name: Oriental Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Flank steak, trimmed and cut into 2-inch x 1/8-inch strips
1 medium Green pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the soy sauce, cornstarch, sugar, and ginger together.
2. Coat the meat with the soy sauce mixture.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large frying pan.
4. Add the green pepper strips and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove the green pepper from the pan.
5. Heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in the same pan.
6. Add the meat and cook for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the beef is lightly browned.
7. Add the green pepper and pineapple, and heat through.
8. Serve over rice.
NOTE: Steak is easier to cut when partially frozen.
Calories per 3/4 cup serving: About 355 with rice
Source: FOOD -- by U.S. Department of Agriculture
